title: Israel 100+ Lebanon strikes
snippet: Over 100 Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon within 48 hours. Town of Zawtar al-Sharqiyah targeted. One IDF soldier killed in combat in southern Lebanon (21 total IDF losses since March 2). Over 2,900 people killed in Lebanon since war began, including 400+ since ceasefire took effect. Air attack continues despite 45-day ceasefire extension.
tag_reason: 5/17 신규 — 48시간 100+ 공습, 자우타르 알샤르키야 집중 타격
